name: A&W Revenue Royalties Income Fund
summary: A&W Revenue Royalties Income Fund, a limited purpose trust, holds investment in A&W Trade Marks Inc., which through its ownership interest in A&W Trade Marks Limited Partnership owns the A&W trade-marks used in the A&W quick service restaurant business in Canada. A&W Trade Marks Inc. licenses A&W trade-marks to A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. As of February 17, 2021, the company had 994 A&W restaurants. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in North Vancouver, Canada.
